## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded hex colors (frontend changes)
- [ ] No inline styles outside animation-only usage (frontend changes)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in code
- [ ] No `any` types added (TypeScript)
- [ ] CSS Modules only — no Tailwind, no MUI (frontend changes)
- [ ] All async operations have loading/disabled states (frontend changes)
- [ ] All new tables show headers when empty (frontend changes)
- [ ] Build passes: `npm run build` in frontend, `npx tsc -b --noEmit` in stasis and backend
